guide:
## West Feerot Quest

**Quest Name:** West Feerot-Djarum
**Level:** 20+
**Class:** All
**Quest NPC:** Fugi Bactor

Notes: Bottlefish are light blue at 20.
Ghastly Kin in cave are yellow (some red) at 20.
Fungusman Slave is surrounded by some big bad red undead casters. None of the undead in cave can see through invis.

1. Start at south gate of Oggok and head West and slightly South to find Fugi.

2. The fungusmen speak in code. Here is the code:
y=a
x=b
w=c
v=d
u=e
t=f
s=g
r=h
q=i
p=j
o=k
n=l
m=m
l=n
k=o
j=p
i=q
h=r
g=s
f=t
e=u
d=v
c=w
b=x
a=y
z=z

3. You are told "The largemouth bottlefish swallowed the fertilizer."

4. Largemouth bottlefish are located south around bridge with lizardmen.

5. You are told "Bring Fugi a bottle of water from the waterboy."

6. Waterboy is located SouthWest among lizardmen near church. Will need to pay 1050 for water.

7. Fugi asks you, "CQNN AKE THUU MA THQULV?" ("Will you free my friend?"posticon

8. You should respond, "Q CQNN." ("I will."posticon

9. Fugi tells you, "He has been a slave for many years. Ogre has enslaved my friend in the dungeon. Free him now. Ogre holds many captive souls below ground. Free him and I will give you my secret. He cannot play with me because ogre makes him work very hard."

10. You should respond, "Yes."

11. Fugi tells you, "Go and tell him you are there to free him. You will have great wisdom for helping my friend."

12. Go West to cave with ghouls

13. Talk to the Fungusman Slave to "free" him, and then return to Fugi.
